Web Audio Recorder – Capture & Save MP3/WAV
Effortlessly record browser audio on any tab into high‑quality MP3 or WAV files—perfect for podcasts, lectures, music & more.

Web Audio Recorder — Your Ultimate Browser Audio Capture Tool

Quickly and effortlessly record browser audio from any tab directly into high-quality MP3 or WAV files — no external software needed. Perfect for creators who need a simple, privacy-focused way to capture streaming audio, internet radio, webinars, lectures, podcasts, and music.

🎙️ Perfect for:
▸ Podcasts & Interviews — record live shows or remote discussions directly from your browser.
▸ Lectures & Webinars — save online classes and training with a single click.
▸ Music & Streams — capture streaming audio, internet radio, or sound effects.
▸ Tutorials & Voice Notes — create voice memos, guides, and quick demos without exporting.

🔧 Key Features (what you can do):
▸ Tab audio capture — record audio from any active tab (system/browser audio).
▸ MP3 & WAV output — choose compressed MP3 (low/medium/high bitrate) or lossless WAV for highest fidelity.
▸ High-quality audio — control MP3 quality and preserve stereo channels when available.
▸ Custom duration — set a maximum recording time (e.g., 20 minutes).
▸ Mute tab while recording — automatically silence the recording tab for private sessions.
▸ Hotkeys — start/stop instantly with Shift + R / Shift + S.
▸ Local saving, no uploads — all files are saved locally; no server uploads, ensuring privacy and offline use.
▸ Lightweight & real-time — records in real time with minimal CPU usage and no delays.

🚀 How it works:

1.Install Web Audio Recorder from the Chrome Web Store.
2.Open the tab with the audio you want to capture.
3.Click Record or press Shift + R.
4.Stop with Shift + S and download your MP3 or WAV file.

⭐ Why choose Web Audio Recorder?
✅ Simple, intuitive interface for fast recording.
✅ Record streaming audio and save locally in MP3/WAV.
✅ High-quality, low-latency capture — suitable for podcasts and music.
✅ Privacy-focused: no ads, no sign-ups, 100% offline.
✅ Free to use and lightweight.

📌 Pro tips: use WAV for lossless archives and MP3 (high) for podcast publishing. For webinars or recordings where you need maximum clarity, enable the highest MP3 quality or choose WAV.

🌟 Start capturing audio from your browser — fast, private, and under your control.
Install Web Audio Recorder now and turn your browser into a powerful audio capture tool.

asbplayer is a language-learning assistant, developed for serious language learners who learn their target language through subtitled media.

Unlike similar extensions like Language Reactor, asbplayer is completely free, open source, and compatible with almost every streaming video service that exists.

Using asbplayer, you can enhance any streaming video element with:

- Text-selectable subtitles. You can bring your own subtitle files, or use auto-detected subtitles on popular streaming services like Netflix and YouTube.
- UI and controls to create high-quality Anki flashcards with subtitles, screenshots and audio.
- UI and controls for navigating between subtitles, toggling subtitles on and off, changing the playback rate of the video, and more.
- Special playback modes that e.g. skip all un-subtitled sections of the video in order to optimize your learning.
- Integrates with open source software to annotate subtitles with learning aids - for example, maintaining a database of your known vocabulary to highlight unknown words.

This extension allows for capturing detailed debug information of a FortiManager/FortiAnalyzer's graphical user interface. Requires FortiManager/FortiAnalyzer 6.4.0 GA or greater.

How to use this tool:

1. For capturing:
  a. Login to any FortiManager/FortiAnalyzer that is later than 6.4.0 GA, this extension color will turn blue (activated).
  b. Click this extension and select "New Capture"
  c. update the file name and select "Start Capture"
  d. FortiManager/FortiAnalyzer should prompt for permission, select "OK" to start capturing debug information.
  e. A red record icon appears in the FortiManager/FortiAnalyzer toolbar.
  f. After finishing your operation, click the record icon to stop and download the captured zip file.

2. For viewing:
  a. Open this extension and select "View Existing Capture".
  b. Open the captured zip file in the newly opened viewer tab.
  c. Start the video to view the operation and different captured information.
Collect online evidence in a faster, safer and easier way!

Defamation, bullying, fake news or others?
Download our plugin for free on a Chrome browser and collect evidence at any time, anywhere.

The solution Proof of Authenticity for Web Content makes a full copy of the content being viewed on your browser and automatically generates a report proving its existence. It is possible to register the authenticity of content published on the web, be it on websites, blogs, social media platforms or portals. Additionally, from the report, a hash - a unique and exclusive code - is calculated, which identifies your document on our website.  

For that, we use the most advanced technology: the blockchain. With a register on blockchain, it is possible to prove that the evidence was not modified, with the content being preserved even if the original publication is deleted. It has also an additional lawyer of protection with the timestamp, which indicates the precise date and time that the evidence was collected. 

RECOMMENDATIONS:

- The plugin can only be installed on Chrome browser. After the installation, we recommend that you reload the browser or the tabs with the content you want to collect.

- In the case of social media, try to use the link to the specific post.

- To use the plugin, simply click on the extension icon, which can be found on the top right corner of your browser.


ATTENTION: Some plugins might try to prevent PACWeb from running, so we suggest that you DEACTIVATE all the extensions on your browser before using it. Check also the LANGUAGE OF YOUR BROWSER to make sure that the report is generated in the language you need.
The report generated by our plugin will only have LEGAL VALIDITY if certified on our platform.


- After collecting the content, a PDF file is generated, which will be automatically downloaded to your computer, and from which a hash is calculated on the OriginalMy website.

- In order for the PDF to be valid as proof of authenticity, it is necessary to certify its hash on blockchain or authenticate the copy of the web page at the notary. Both can be done through our platform, with administrative fees to be paid. 

- In the case of Notarial Authentication, the content collected must be public so that it can be accessed by the notary. Please note that this is valid only in Brazil.

- After payment, you can go to the OriginalMy website and submit the PDF file to check the certification status.

This tool is intended as a mechanism to collect additional evidence for court proceedings. Its legal validity is assured in Brazil, so please refer to your lawyer to inquire about the validity in your country. 

OriginalMy is a platform for the authenticity of files and documents, people and signatures, connected to four public blockchains: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Ethereum Classic and DeCred.

ZumaPiano – AI piano transcription from YouTube or any site, or upload MIDI, to turn music into interactive piano lessons.

ZumaPiano uses AI to transcribe any piano audio on the internet into an interactive waterfall-style lesson. Whether the music is from YouTube, a website playing piano audio, your own recordings, or a MIDI upload, ZumaPiano transcribes it and converts it into notes you can slow down, loop, and practice with left or right hand separately.


WHAT ZUMAPIANO DOES

- Transcribes piano audio from YouTube into practice-ready waterfall lessons
- Records and transcribes piano from any website that can play audio, not just YouTube
- Upload MIDI files for instant, accurate transcription into a visual lesson
- Waterfall note display for intuitive visual learning
- Slow down or speed up the transcription playback
- Loop challenging parts for focused repetition
- Practice left hand, right hand, or both hands together
- Toggle note names on or off depending on your learning preference
- Control playback using voice commands (Play, Pause, Faster, Slower, Back, Forward)
- Save unlimited songs in your personal library with Premium
- Edit song titles, images, and information
- Group songs into playlists for structured practice
- Multi-language interface for learners worldwide


WHERE IT WORKS

ZumaPiano transcribes piano audio from:
- YouTube
- Spotify (clean piano tracks)
- SoundCloud piano covers
- Piano tutorial websites
- Blogs and pages with embedded piano audio
- Private teaching portals and shared video files
- Any webpage capable of playing a piano recording

If a browser tab can play piano audio, ZumaPiano can transcribe it.


WHO IT IS FOR

- Beginners learning their first piano songs
- Intermediate players needing slower, clear practice tools
- Advanced musicians drilling complex passages
- Teachers creating custom lessons for students
- Anyone who wants to learn piano songs not available as sheet music or tutorials


HOW IT WORKS

From any website:
1) Play a piano piece on the webpage.
2) Open the ZumaPiano extension and press Record.
3) After AI transcription, open the generated lesson and practice using waterfalls, tempo control, and looping.

From a MIDI file:
1) Open ZumaPiano and select Upload MIDI.
2) Choose your MIDI file.
3) The transcription appears instantly with full practice controls.


FREE VS PREMIUM

Free mode includes two songs in your library and core practice tools. Premium unlocks unlimited songs, playlists, advanced features, and priority transcription.


FAQ

Does ZumaPiano only work with YouTube?
No. ZumaPiano can transcribe piano audio from any website.

Is it suitable for beginners?
Yes. Waterfall notes, tempo adjustment, and looping make it ideal for new learners.

Does it generate sheet music?
No. ZumaPiano focuses on interactive waterfall-style lessons rather than sheet music.

Does it work on mobile?
The Chrome extension works on desktop (Windows, Mac, Linux, ChromeOS). Mobile support is planned.


PRIVACY AND SECURITY

No login required. ZumaPiano processes only the audio or files you choose. It does not access browsing history or personal data.


Install ZumaPiano to transcribe and learn any piano song from anywhere on the internet.
Korean popup dictionary for YouTube, Netflix & any website

🎯 WHO IS THIS FOR?
You know 500+ Korean words. You want to learn from real Korean content — YouTube, Netflix, novels, news — but looking up words constantly kills the flow. Kimchi Reader fixes that. Use it alongside your textbooks, classes, or any other study method.

📖 WHAT THE EXTENSION DOES
Hover over any Korean word on any website to get an instant popup with definitions, grammar breakdown, hanja origins, idioms, and frequency rank. Both English and Korean monolingual definitions. No copy-pasting, no tab switching.

🔍 Popup dictionary on any Korean website
🎬 Dual Korean-English subtitles on YouTube, Netflix, and Viki
📊 Vocabulary tracking (Unknown → Seen → Known) — words change color as you learn, and you get detailed stats on your vocabulary growth and reading comprehension
⛏️ One-click sentence mining with Anki export

📈 TRACK YOUR PROGRESS
Mark words as you learn them and watch your stats grow. See your known word count, vocabulary breakdown by frequency, comprehension percentage on any content, daily activity time, and more. Everything syncs across devices.

🚀 THE FULL PLATFORM
The extension is part of a larger Korean immersion platform at kimchi-reader.app:

Screenshot or record any part of the web. Build a private knowledge base. Chat with your snips.

What's new in this version? Privacy Snips! Now you can keep your Snips and folders both private & password-protected.

Drag -> Snip -> Share... It's that simple.

That's SnipSnip. It's a screenshot tool, screen recorder, web clipper, and visual bookmarking library in one Chrome extension. It replaces the screenshot, find-the-file, attach, upload, send loop you've been stuck in for years.

Need to show a hover state, a transition, a UI bug, or something a still image can't capture? Press R, drag a region, hit Enter to stop. You get a 15-second video clip as a share link on your clipboard. Record a button animation, a broken form, a confusing checkout flow, a quick product demo, a short walkthrough. Drag, release, paste, done. No video editing software, no uploading to YouTube, no "one second while I screen record this."

FIND ANYTHING YOU'VE SAVED WITHOUT REMEMBERING WHERE YOU SAVED IT
Every capture lives in a searchable, AI-powered library. SnipSnip silently analyzes each snip and pulls out keywords, people, companies, topics, and themes. You never tag anything manually.

Type "Lamborghini" weeks later and find that car photo. Type "earnings" and find that financial chart. Type "dark mode" and find every UI screenshot with a dark theme. Type "competitor pricing" and find that pricing table you screenshotted in a rush. Type "checkout" and find every ecommerce flow you captured. Even snips you saved with no note attached are fully searchable.

HOW IT WORKS
Click the SnipSnip icon or press S to enter Snip mode. Drag to capture any area of the page. The screenshot saves instantly and a share link copies to your clipboard.
Hold C while dragging to copy the image itself to your clipboard instead of a link. Paste the actual screenshot into any image field.
Hold D while dragging to add a quick note to the capture before it saves.
Press R to enter Record mode. Drag a region to capture just that area as video, or press Enter to record the full viewport. 15-second clips, saved as share links the same way screenshots are.

Every snip lands in your Inbox with the screenshot or video, the source URL, page title, date, and the text from the page automatically extracted.

ORGANIZE YOUR WAY
New snips land in your Inbox. Drag them into custom folders like "Design Inspo", "Research", "Bug Reports", or "Competitors". Drag snips within a folder to reorder them. The Inbox badge shows your unsorted count like unread emails.

SHARE INSTANTLY
Every capture generates a share link automatically. Share individual snips or entire folders. Anyone with the link sees your content on a clean page at snipsnip.ai. Revoke access anytime with one click.

CLOUD SYNC
Sign in with Google to sync your library across devices. Switch laptops, clear your cache, reinstall. Your snips are always there.

AI ASSISTANT INTEGRATION
Connect your SnipSnip library to Claude or any MCP-compatible AI assistant. Your captures become memory for your AI. Ask it to search your library, organize your folders, summarize what you saved this week, or find that one thing you captured on Tuesday.

WHO USES SNIPSNIP
Designers save visual inspiration from around the web. Instead of a messy folder called "design inspo" full of unlabeled PNGs, every screenshot is searchable and tagged automatically. Build mood boards, reference collections, and style guides without the file management headache.

Product managers file visual bug reports faster. Drag over the broken element, let go, paste the link into Linear or Jira. Engineers get the screenshot, the source URL, and the page context in one link. For UI bugs that only happen on hover or in transitions, record a 15-second video clip instead.

Sales reps capture competitor pages and share them with their teams. Drop into the prospect's site, grab the pricing page or the feature list, paste it into Slack. Every capture is in a searchable library, so the next time you need that competitor's homepage from three months ago, it's one search away.

Marketers build swipe files of ad creative, landing pages, and email designs. Every capture is tagged by AI, so searching "B2B landing page" or "dark CTA button" actually returns results.

Researchers and journalists collect visual evidence. Screenshots preserve the source URL and page title automatically, so you always know where something came from. Organize into folders by topic, project, or client.

Founders and operators save the ideas they see around the web. A product page with clever onboarding, a site with a smart pricing table, a tweet about a competitor, a chart from an earnings report. Everything in one searchable place.
Content creators build reference libraries. Screenshots, visual snippets, and short video clips all live together with AI tagging.

Students save study materials. Diagrams from lectures, figures from papers, tables from textbooks. All searchable later, long after the tab is closed.

FREE AND PRO
Free includes unlimited screenshots, 100 video clips, cloud sync, AI search, sharing, and 5 folders.

Pro at $8/month unlocks unlimited video clips, unlimited folders and subfolders, removed SnipSnip branding on shared pages, MCP integration for AI assistants, and hidden badge notifications.

KEY FEATURES

Drag-to-capture screenshot tool. Works on any part of any webpage.
15-second video clip recording. Capture a region or the full viewport.
Instant share link copied to clipboard on every capture.
AI-powered search across screenshots, video thumbnails, source page text, and auto-generated tags.
Cloud sync across devices with Google sign-in.
Visual bookmarking library with folder organization and drag-and-drop reorder.
Inbox system with badge count for unsorted snips.
Copy screenshot to clipboard as an image instead of a link (C + drag).
Add a note to a snip before it saves (D + drag).
AI assistant integration via MCP for Claude and other compatible assistants (Pro).
Light and dark mode.
Keyboard shortcuts: S to snip, R to record, C + drag to copy image, D + drag to add a note, I for Inbox, H for hotkey list, Esc to exit.

SnipSnip replaces your screenshot tool, screen recorder, web clipper, and visual bookmarking workflow with one Chrome extension. Stop saving screenshots to your desktop. Stop losing the source URL. Stop scrolling through your Downloads folder looking for that thing you saved last week. Just snip and share.

USE CASES
SnipSnip is used for visual bug reporting and design feedback, UI screenshot capture and annotation, product research and competitor analysis, sales prospecting and marketing swipe files, content research and visual bookmarking, web clipping and screen recording, async video messaging and quick product demos, design inspiration boards and mood boards, research archiving and source collection, meeting prep and presentation building, and replacing your old screenshot folder with a library you can actually search.

PRIVACY
Snips are stored locally by default. Sign in with Google to enable cloud sync and sharing. AI descriptions are processed through our secure servers. We collect anonymous usage analytics only. Full privacy policy at snipsnip.ai/privacy.

The in5 Animated GIF Maker lets you create animated GIFs (and videos) using Adobe InDesign.

Take advantage of InDesign's…

The in5 Animated GIF Maker lets you create animated GIFs (and videos) using Adobe InDesign.

Take advantage of InDesign's easy-to-use Animation and Timing tools to create animated images for social media (Facebook, Linkedin, Twitter) and email newsletters.

The GIF Maker is free to use, but a license is required for in5. More info: http://in5.ajar.pro

Note: GIFs only support 256 colors, and in an animated GIF that color palette is shared across all of the frames. So photographic images will look grainy (and they do in all GIFs).

v2 now supports recording of images and adds built-in optimization.

v3 lets you export video so that you can open in Photoshop and get precious control of your colors before exporting to an animated GIF from there.

PinyinTube is a Chrome extension that helps users learn languages and improve their speaking skills while watching their favorite…

PinyinTube is a Chrome extension that helps users learn languages and improve their speaking skills while watching their favorite movies online. The extension is now available on four different streaming platforms: Netflix, YouTube, iQIYI (iq.com) and Rakuten VIki (viki.com). Every platform has some free features and some premium features. For a detailed pricing comparison, please visit swapbrain.com . In the popup, there is a button to activate PinyinTube, as well as a button to purchase the premium version. 

In this new version, we added a free feature to automatically generate subtitle for any audio streams from all websites. This is particularly useful for news channels and podcasts where there are no provided subtitle. To activate this feature, toggle on the "Automatic Video Subtitles" in the pop-up. Then on the browser Translation window, click on CC to choose the languages for translating the subtitles.

For movies channels with provided subtitles, you can Toggle on Activate PinyinTube to translate the current subtitle to a second language. To activate more free features, please sign on to our Forum by submitting your email address on the popup, then toggle activate button. Once activated, you will see a few buttons on the right edge of the videos. The Seek Back button goes backward sentence-by-sentence, helping you to repeat the actor's voice. The Dual Subtitle helps display a second subtitle that translates the current subtitle to your native language. When you turn on Chinese subtitle, the Pinyin pronunciation will also appear, helping you to read Chinese. Especially, there is a Voice Record button that works only for the Premium version, helping you to record your voice to compare with the actor's voice. The Seek Forward button goes forward by five seconds. Note, if the buttons do not work, please try refreshing the browser.

Limit the maximum decibel level in a browser tab

Decibel Limiter: Smart Volume Control for Chrome

Protect your hearing and enjoy a consistent audio experience with Decibel Limiter. This lightweight extension automatically monitors and limits the volume of any audio or video playing in your browser tabs.

🔊 Key Features:
• Real-time volume limiting based on customizable decibel thresholds
• Visual audio level meter showing current volume in dBFS
• Per-tab configuration allows different settings for different websites
• Works with popular streaming services including Netflix
• Dark mode support that adapts to your system preferences

Perfect for night browsing, shared workspaces, or anyone who wants to avoid sudden loud sounds while surfing the web. Decibel Limiter processes all audio locally on your device with no data collection or external connections.

🚀 Full-screen Note for Enhanced Mode (Mic icon):
By design, Chrome prevents extensions that manipulate audio from entering true full-screen mode. This ensures the blue rectangle icon stays visible in the tab bar, letting you know the extension is actively processing sound. It's an intentional security measure and cannot be disabled. You can still get a more immersive view by pressing F11 (Windows) or Ctrl + Cmd + F (Mac) to enter full-screen manually.

Take control of your audio experience today!
